'''Enkep''' was the first [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Adumar system/Legends|Katorrs system]]. A [[Magma/Legends|molten]] ball of rock, it had no [[Moon/Legends|moons]], life, or [[Water/Legends|water]] and was therefore all but ignored by [[Cartographer/Legends|cartographers]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

{{Planet-stub}}
